info.name: Scrape a URL and Return HTML, Screenshot, or JSON

params.name: api_key
params.description: ScrapingBee account key.

params.name: url
params.description: URL to scrape (must be URL-encoded, include scheme).

params.name: render_js
params.description: Execute JavaScript via headless browser. Defaults to true (5 credits).

params.name: js_scenario
params.description: JSON-encoded scenario describing browser interactions (clicks, fills, scrolls, waits).

params.name: wait
params.description: Additional rendering delay in milliseconds.

params.name: wait_for
params.description: CSS or XPath selector to wait for before returning.

params.name: wait_browser
params.description: Browser state condition to wait for.

params.name: premium_proxy
params.description: Use residential premium proxy pool (10 credits without JS, 25 with JS).

params.name: stealth_proxy
params.description: Use the stealth proxy pool for high-protection sites (75 credits).

params.name: country_code
params.description: ISO 3166-1 country code for proxy geolocation.

params.name: block_ads
params.description: Block advertisements during rendering.

params.name: block_resources
params.description: Block heavy resources (images, fonts, css) to speed up rendering.

params.name: cookies
params.description: Semicolon-separated cookie list to send with the request.

params.name: forward_headers
params.description: Forward Spb-* prefixed headers to the target site.

params.name: screenshot
params.description: Return a screenshot of the page instead of HTML.

params.name: screenshot_full_page
params.description: Capture a full-page screenshot, not just the viewport.

params.name: screenshot_selector
params.description: CSS selector to limit the screenshot region.

params.name: json_response
params.description: Wrap response in JSON format with metadata.

params.name: return_page_text
params.description: Return plain text content instead of HTML.

params.name: return_page_markdown
params.description: Return content as Markdown.

params.name: return_page_source
params.description: Return the pre-JavaScript HTML source.

params.name: extract_rules
params.description: JSON-encoded extraction rules (CSS or XPath selectors).

params.name: ai_query
params.description: Natural-language instruction for AI-powered data extraction.

params.name: ai_extract_rules
params.description: JSON-encoded AI extraction rules mapping field names to natural-language descriptions.

items.docs:
Fetch a target URL through ScrapingBee's headless browser and proxy network.
Returns rendered HTML by default, or a screenshot/JSON wrapper/markdown/text
depending on the parameters supplied.

info.name: Scrape a URL with a POST Body

params.name: api_key
params.description: ScrapingBee account key.

items.docs:
Same as the GET variant but accepts a request body that is forwarded to
the target URL as either form-encoded data or JSON.

info.name: Run a Google Search and Return Structured SERP JSON

params.name: api_key
params.description: ScrapingBee account key.

params.name: search
params.description: Query string as typed into the Google search bar.

params.name: search_type
params.description: Which Google vertical to query.

params.name: country_code
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for result localization.

params.name: language
params.description: Result language (hl parameter equivalent).

params.name: nb_results
params.description: Number of results to return.

params.name: page
params.description: Result page number.

params.name: device
params.description: Render Google as desktop or mobile.

params.name: extra_params
params.description: Additional Google query parameters (gl, hl, num, start, etc.).

params.name: light_request
params.description: Use the cheaper, faster light request mode.

params.name: full_html
params.description: Return the full SERP HTML alongside the structured payload.

items.docs:
Execute a Google query via ScrapingBee's dedicated Search API and receive
structured JSON results: organic listings, knowledge graph, featured
snippets, news, maps, image results, related searches, and ads.
